owner_operator_stated: Dr. Phillip J. Fijal, D.D.S., purchased/founded the practice in late 1987 and is the owner; Dr. Michelle E. Knebelsberger, D.M.D., joined as associate dentist in summer 2017.
notes: Corroborated by exact address match (29 N Broadway St, Des Plaines, IL 60016-2335) and exact phone match ((847) 824-5252) on the practice's own site. Public-facing brand is 'Broadway Family Dental Group'; underlying legal/NPI entity is Fijal & Associates. vendor_website_hint (broadwayfamilydentalgroup.com) was correct. No hiring/careers page found. No indication of DSO/multi-location group affiliation.

vendor_website_hint (myfirstclasssmile.com) belongs to a DIFFERENT practice at the same building -- 'First Class Smiles' (780 Lee St, 2nd Floor, Des Plaines IL 60016; phone (847) 264-4152; Dr. Victor Grandinetti & Dr. Paul Morrison) -- a different suite and a different phone number than this record (780 Lee St Ste 104, (847) 827-1809), so it was rejected as not this practice. Multiple third-party directories (Yelp, WebMD, Healthgrades) list this practice's own domain as kennydental.com, but that domain fails to resolve (DNS/connection failure confirmed directly) -- treated as dead. No live site could be corroborated by address or phone.

owner_operator_stated: The current occupant of this address/phone is Roseroot Dental, self-described as founded by Dr. Alfred Roseroot, DMD ('Founder,' 49 years of general dentistry experience). The named record entity 'THE DENTAL STORE, LTD.' appears to be a distinct, still-operating dental chain headquartered in Schaumburg, IL (dentalstore.com, 1061 S Roselle Rd, phone (847) 301-0400 -- a different phone) that likely once registered an NPI satellite location at this Des Plaines address. Roseroot Dental's own site makes no mention of 'The Dental Store' or any prior-name history.
notes: Phone (847) 699-3370 and address (1455 E Golf Rd, Des Plaines IL 60016, Suite 216 -- NPI record lists Suite 118) both match this record exactly on roserootdental.com, but that site identifies the practice as 'Roseroot Dental,' founded and owned by Dr. Alfred Roseroot -- not 'The Dental Store, Ltd.' The Dental Store brand is a separate, currently operating Schaumburg-based chain (dentalstore.com) with a different phone number. This looks like a successor/rebrand situation at this address; no source ties 'The Dental Store, Ltd.' to Dr. Roseroot's practice. vendor_website_hint (roserootdental.com) correctly identifies the live site at this phone number, but the practice's public name does not match the record's named entity.

Corroborated by exact phone match ((847) 640-0778) and exact address match (645 W Golf Rd, Des Plaines, IL 60016) on the /office page. Site does not explicitly state an owner; Dr. Roman Dziubyk is described elsewhere as having served the practice/community for 25+ years. No careers/hiring page found. No indication of DSO/multi-location group affiliation.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Mark Levy is president/owner (per BBB profile) and appears on the practice homepage in a father/son photo caption ('Dr. Levy son and father'), suggesting a second, unnamed family-member dentist may also practice there; practice has operated since 1985.
notes: Corroborated by exact phone match ((847) 827-2929) and exact address match (444 Lee St, Des Plaines, IL 60016) on the practice's own homepage. Homepage photo caption references a 'son and father' pair of Dr. Levys, but only Dr. Mark Levy's name/role was independently confirmed (via BBB). No careers/hiring page found; /about path returned 404. No indication of DSO/multi-location group affiliation.

owner_operator_stated: The named record entity RSPATEL, INC. operated as 'Library Plaza Dental Center' (Dr. Sivan Patel, per LocalMed booking listing) at 1533 Ellinwood Ave with phone (847) 297-0100; Yelp marks that listing CLOSED (checked May 2026). The address is now occupied by a different practice, 'AJ Dental Center' (Dr. Mohammed Jabbar, UIC College of Dentistry 2013 grad), with different phone numbers ((847) 582-3352 / (847) 916-8761) -- NOT (847) 297-0100.
notes: vendor_website_hint (ajdentalcenter.com) leads to the NEW occupant of this address, not the named record entity. This record's own phone (847) 297-0100 traces to 'Library Plaza Dental Center' (Dr. Sivan Patel), which Yelp lists as CLOSED. AJ Dental Center (Dr. Mohammed Jabbar) is the current live operator at 1533 Ellinwood St/Ave, with different phone numbers -- a practice-closure/successor situation, not the named entity RSPATEL, INC.
